'''Peppel''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the wanted [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] former [[Devaronian Army|army]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]] fled to Peppel, where for the following [[19 ABY/Legends|two years]] he resided in a simple [[Labria's hut|hut]] that was protected by a sophisticated security system. Eventually, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] tracked Kardue'sai'Malloc to Peppel, where, eschewing his [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|combat armor]] and wielding only a [[Compound bow|bow]] and [[Knife/Legends|knife]] in order to bypass the Devaronian's security system, Fett captured the fugitive and went on to deliver him to the world [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] for [[Death/Legends|execution]].

==Description==
Peppel was a terrestrial<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Slugthrowers">{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref> located in the [[Peppel system/Legends|Peppel system]], a part of the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="NewTerritories" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A quiet<ref name="JustWhoIs">{{StoryCite|story=Just Who Is Boba Fett?|book=Star Wars: Boba Fett}}</ref> and primitive world,<ref name="CSWE" /> Peppel featured on its surface an area with clearings and mud.<ref name="LastOneStanding" />

==History==
[[File:Labria.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Boba Fett captured Kardue'sai'Malloc (pictured) on Peppel.]]
In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]],<ref name="17 ABY">{{CSWECite|III|19|Peppel}} establishes that [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]] fled to Peppel thirteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which corresponds to [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> after [[Death/Legends|killing]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> of the Outer Rim's [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> four [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] who had recognized him, the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]],<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> a former [[Devaronian Army|army]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]<ref name="CSWE Malloc">{{CSWECite|II|198|Kardue'sai'Malloc (Labria)}}</ref> on whom a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of five million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] had been posted and who was living under the alias "Labria,"<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> fled to Peppel.<ref name="CSWE" /> There, he resided in a simple [[Labria's hut|hut]] where he [[Diet/Legends|ate]] slaughtered animals<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> and spent his time drinking [[Merenzane Gold/Legends|Merenzane Gold]] [[Liquor/Legends|liquor]] and curating<ref name="CSWE Malloc" /> his extensive collection of very rare [[Music/Legends|music]].<ref name="LastOneStanding" />

[[19 ABY/Legends|Two years]] later,<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] tracked Kardue'sai'Malloc to Peppel after tracing the sales of Merenzane Gold across the Arkanis [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Leaving his [[Amphibious Interstellar Assault Transport/infantry|starship]], the ''[[Slave IV]]'', outside the range of the [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] that formed a part of the security system installed around the Devaronian's abode, Fett approached the hut on [[Limb/Legends|foot]], eventually also leaving a callback to the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] beyond the sensors' range, two [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] away. Eschewing his suit of [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|combat armor]], the [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] made his final approach wearing nothing but [[Clothing/Legends|shorts]] and armed with a [[compound bow]] and a [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] [[Knife/Legends|knife]]. Fett ultimately captured Kardue'sai'Malloc, and, after being forced by the latter to dig up his music collection, the bounty hunter led the Devaronian in boarding the ''Slave IV''—which Fett had brought down for a landing closer to the hut. Subsequently, the vessel departed for<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] world<ref name="TEA" /> [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]], where Kardue'sai'Malloc would be executed.<ref name="LastOneStanding" />

==Locations==
{{Main|Labria's hut}}
On Peppel, Kardue'sai'Malloc resided in a primitive<ref name="Slugthrowers" /> but spacious hut that lay next to a muddy clearing and had an open-air [[Toilet/Legends|toilet]] ten [[Meter/Legends|meters]] away. Another clearing was located a few kilometers from the hut. The dwelling was protected by<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> an elaborate<ref name="CSWE" /> security system that included [[tripwire]]s, [[light trap]]s, and [[Motion sensor/Legends|motion sensors]]. Outside the hut, Kardue'sai'Malloc had buried his collection of music under a few [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]] of dirt.<ref name="LastOneStanding" />

==Behind the scenes==
Peppel first appeared in "[[The Last One Standing: The Tale of Boba Fett]]," a short story by [[Daniel Keys Moran]] that was published in the [[1996]] anthology ''[[Tales of the Bounty Hunters]]''.<ref name="LastOneStanding" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Peppel [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square P-3.<ref name="TEA Peppel" />
